headline: 7 Industrial Stocks to Buy and 1 to Avoid
summary: The firm has seven new Buy ratings and one Sell within what it calls the multi-industry and electrical equipment sectors.  “We are positive on our data-center power/cooling names…our price targets imply about 30% to 40% upside,” wrote analyst Varun Govindaraj, adding they have technical advantages.

raw.headline: 7 Industrial Stocks to Buy and 1 to Avoid

headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness after unexpectedly strong U.S. job-growth data dampened expectations for a Fed rate cut.
summary: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness after unexpectedly strong U.S. job-growth data dampened expectations for a Fed rate cut.

headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage On Emerson Electric with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $175
summary: Bernstein  analyst Varun Govindaraj   initiates coverage on Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $175.
